## Problem

## Scope check

mdview's PRD scope is "reader-first home for Markdown". Things explicitly out of scope:

- Real-time collaboration / multi-user editing
- Knowledge management / backlinks
- Self-hosted media / image library

If your request is in one of those areas, please explain why mdview should expand scope vs you using a tool that already covers it.

## Surfaces affected

- [ ] `@mdview/core` (engine)
- [ ] `@mdview/themes`
- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Web (mdview.sh)
- [ ] Browser extension
- [ ] VS Code extension
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] MCP server
- [ ] Documentation
